creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
If there is a problem with the terminal emulation and the screen gets
	a bit garbled when running /stand/sysinstall, it would be nice to be
	able to force a redraw by means of <Ctrl>-<L>. Unfortunately this does
	not seem to work (unlike SuSE YaST, for example).

How-To-Repeat: 
	See "Description".
